name: blinkr
description: Blinkr — fast, modern text messaging for web and desktop

scripts.build:desktop:prod: npm run build:production -w @blinkr/web && npm run tauri build -w @blinkr/desktop -- --config src-tauri/tauri.ci.json
scripts.deploy: npm run build:production -w @blinkr/web && npm run deploy -w @blinkr/api
